title: Trump's 'Golden Dome' will cost $1.2tn and might not stop all-out missile attack
description: That pricetag is nearly seven times higher than Trump's initial estimate, found an independent budget office.
content:
US President Donald Trump's futuristic "Golden Dome" missile defence system will cost about $1.2 ​tn (£882bn) to develop, deploy and operate over two decades, the nonpartisan Congressional Budget Office estimates.

title: Jason Collins: NBA's first openly gay player dies aged 47
description: Collins shared late last year that he had been diagnosed with an aggressive form of brain cancer.
content:
Former pro-basketball player Jason Collins, the first active male athlete on a major American professional team sport to come out as gay, has died aged 47.
Collins died after a "valiant fight with glioblastoma", an aggressive form of brain cancer, hi... [2516 chars]

title: Daily pill helps keep weight off after stopping obesity jabs
description: The tablet - orforglipron - is available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.
content:
A new daily pill could help people coming off weight-loss jabs remain slim, latest research says.
The drug is already available in the US and could soon launch in the UK.
Trials found that patients given the tablet, called orforglipron, every day for... [1557 chars]
